prompt: Write a complete Python training script that fine-tunes meta-llama/Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct on an Alpaca-format JSONL dataset at ./data/alpaca.jsonl. Each line of the JSONL has keys 'instruction', 'input', and 'output'. Use PEFT LoRA (rank 16, alpha 32, dropout 0.05) targeting the q_proj and v_proj modules. Use TRL's SFTTrainer. Train one epoch with per-device batch size 2, learning rate 2e-4, bf16. Save the resulting adapter to ./adapter. Print 'done' on completion.

criteria.description: Runs 1 epoch on 10 synthetic samples without raising

reference_solution:
from datasets import load_dataset
from peft import LoraConfig, PeftModel
from transformers import AutoModelForCausalLM, AutoTokenizer
from trl import SFTConfig, SFTTrainer

model_id = 'meta-llama/Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct'
tokenizer = AutoTokenizer.from_pretrained(model_id)
if tokenizer.pad_token is None:
    tokenizer.pad_token = tokenizer.eos_token
model = AutoModelForCausalLM.from_pretrained(model_id, torch_dtype='bfloat16')

ds = load_dataset('json', data_files='./data/alpaca.jsonl', split='train')
def format_row(row):
    instr = row['instruction']
    if row.get('input'):
        instr = instr + '\n\n' + row['input']
    return {'text': f'### Instruction:\n{instr}\n\n### Response:\n' + row['output']}
ds = ds.map(format_row)

lora = LoraConfig(r=16, lora_alpha=32, lora_dropout=0.05,
                  target_modules=['q_proj', 'v_proj'],
                  bias='none', task_type='CAUSAL_LM')
args = SFTConfig(output_dir='./adapter', per_device_train_batch_size=2,
                 num_train_epochs=1, learning_rate=2e-4, bf16=True,
                 logging_steps=1, save_strategy='no')
trainer = SFTTrainer(model=model, args=args, train_dataset=ds,
                     peft_config=lora, tokenizer=tokenizer)
trainer.train()
trainer.model.save_pretrained('./adapter')
_ = PeftModel.from_pretrained(model, './adapter')
print('done')
